description_long: This is a small, single-story Dairy Queen ice cream shop with a flat, gray roof featuring two circular vents and a rooftop HVAC unit. The building is constructed primarily from light-colored concrete or brick, with a bold red trim running along the roofline and a matching red awning over the front. Large glass windows dominate the front facade, providing visibility into the shop, while a prominent retro-style Dairy Queen sign with an illustrated ice cream cone extends above the roof. The shop sits on a tiled pavement, with a small red-and-white mailbox or trash receptacle visible on one side. The overall design is compact and functional, with minimal ornamentation aside from the signage and trim.
description: A compact, retro-style Dairy Queen ice cream shop with a flat roof, large front windows, and a prominent sign featuring an ice cream cone. The building is finished in light concrete with red trim and sits on a tiled pavement.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and front of the shop, highlighting the large Dairy Queen sign with an ice cream cone, the red roof trim, and the main glass windows.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entrance area, large glass windows, and the red awning supported by posts, emphasizing the shop's customer-facing side.
description_view_2: This view reveals the opposite side of the building, including a red-and-white mailbox or trash receptacle and the continuation of the red trim and windows.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a plain wall with a small window and door, lacking signage or decorative elements, and the flat roof with visible vents.
attribute_signage: A large, retro Dairy Queen sign with the text 'DAIRY QUEEN' in white block letters on a blue background, accompanied by an illustrated ice cream cone, mounted above the roof on the front left corner.
attribute_displayed_ice_cream_imagery: A prominent illustrated ice cream cone is integrated into the main Dairy Queen sign above the roof.
attribute_service_window_or_counter: A service counter is present at the front, behind the large glass windows and under the red awning, accessible to customers from the exterior.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro commercial with minimalist, functional design and bold signage.
